phases.name: Design system & landing page
phases.detail: Token-driven components, WCAG-graded palette, SVG iconography shipped in v2.0.0 (PR #19).

phases.name: Planning & process docs
phases.detail: Data pipeline plan, branching and release process, prompt archive, status page shipped in PR #26.

phases.name: Phase A: Daily OSINT data pipeline
phases.detail: Daily Overpass ETL live: 39 auto-listed Oakland venues published via data-sync.yml (daily 10:41 UTC). PR #27 shipped.

phases.name: Phase B: Community submissions
phases.detail: GitHub Issue Form live; hourly ingest validates, sanitizes (XSS boundary), publishes as Community reports. PR #28 shipped.

phases.name: Phase C: Email confirmations
phases.detail: Resend Reply-to-Confirm workflow live: 7-day token expiry, email stored only with Resend (never in repo), GDPR/CCPA compliant. PR #30 shipped.

phases.name: Phase D: Staleness detection
phases.detail: Weekly Overpass liveness checks live (Sundays 10:51 UTC): last_verified tracking, 180-day staleness threshold, missing venue exclusion. PR #31 shipped.

phases.name: Phase E: Licensing & v2.1.0 release
phases.detail: ODbL attribution in README data-sources section, privacy policy updated for Phase D staleness tracking, v2.1.0 release ready. Community data pipeline complete (PR #31 + docs).

phases.name: Phase F: Web form submissions
phases.detail: Building web form on map for direct submissions (no GitHub required). Resend confirmation emails → GitHub Issues → Email confirmed → Published to map. Improved UX vs GitHub Issues form.

phases.name: Phase G: Geographic expansion
phases.detail: Multi-city support: San Francisco, LA, Seattle, Portland. Reuse DATA_SOURCES.md workflow. Staleness checks scale across regions.
